ddls:
CREATE TABLE "urban_areas" (
  "urban_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban area */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the urban area */,
  "nsw_rank" INTEGER /* NSW ranking of the urban area */,
  "population" REAL /* Population of the urban area (as of the last census) */,
  "australia_rank" INTEGER /* National ranking of the urban area */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* 10-year growth rate of the urban area (%) */,
  "urban_area_type" TEXT /* Type of urban area (e.g., city, town, suburb) */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the urban area (km²) */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the urban area (people/km²) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urban_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_years" (
  "census_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the census */,
  "data_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the census data was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data entry */,
  "urban_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban area */,
  "census_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census year */,
  "population" REAL /* Population figure for the urban area in that census year */,
  "population_figure_source" TEXT /* Source of the population figure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_census_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_year_id") REFERENCES census_years ("census_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_urban_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("urban_area_id") REFERENCES urban_areas ("urban_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_rates" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate entry */,
  "urban_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban area */,
  "census_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate (%) for the urban area in that census year */,
  "growth_type" TEXT /* Type of growth (e.g., total, annual, decennial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_rates_census_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_year_id") REFERENCES census_years ("census_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_rates_urban_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("urban_area_id") REFERENCES urban_areas ("urban_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_area_regions" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "urban_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban area */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "mapped_date" TEXT /* Date when the mapping was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_area_regions_urban_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("urban_area_id") REFERENCES urban_areas ("urban_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_area_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., growth analysis, demographic summary) */,
  "generated_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic metric entry */,
  "urban_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the urban area */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the metrics are applicable */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the urban area */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the population in the urban area */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the urban area (%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_metrics_urban_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("urban_area_id") REFERENCES urban_areas ("urban_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., ABS, Local Government) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source for context */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Description of the data coverage (e.g., national, state, regional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new data, data update) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user subscribing */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., new data, data update) */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
